things.name: Catedral de Santa Isabel
things.description: Neo-Gothic Spanish colonial cathedral from 1916 - the most striking landmark in Malabo

things.name: Plaza de la Independencia
things.description: Central colonial square surrounded by government buildings and the Presidential Palace

things.name: Malabo National Park
things.description: Tropical forest surrounding the city with drill monkeys and forest elephants

things.name: Market & Artisans District
things.description: Local crafts and Fang and Bubi tribal art

things.name: Pico Basile National Park
things.description: Hike to the 3,011m summit - the highest point in Equatorial Guinea

things.name: Bioko Island Beaches
things.description: Turtle nesting beaches at Arena Blanca on one of Africa's most unspoilt islands

things.name: Waterfall at Ureka
things.description: Dramatic rainforest waterfall in the wet southern tip of Bioko Island

things.name: Malabo Port
things.description: Historic port where Spanish colonial trade and the modern oil industry converge

things.name: Sopa de Poyo (Chicken Soup)
things.description: Equatorial Guinean specialty - chicken and vegetable soup with plantains
